codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 617ff09. The implementation updates shared market-row ordering and route pagination so explicit names/symbols selectors now match explicit-id behavior, and the added parity test plus manual proof cover the intended ordering, omission, and page-bypass semantics. I did not find any high-confidence correctness bugs in scope.

summary: Pass. The feature correctly makes `/coins/markets` treat explicit `names` and `symbols` selectors like explicit `ids`, with matching automated coverage and no actionable correctness defects found.
